expectations.text: Reads or references all three core CSVs (scenes.csv, scene-briefs.csv, scene-intent.csv)
expectations.evidence: References all three CSVs explicitly — scenes.csv for statuses, scene-briefs.csv for gap analysis, scene-intent.csv for mice_threads gap

expectations.text: Checks or mentions multiple hone domains (at least 2 of: registries, gaps, briefs, structural)
expectations.evidence: Covers all 4 domains with numbered sections: 1. Gaps, 2. Registries, 3. Structural issues, 4. Brief quality

expectations.text: Identifies new-x1 (or scenes with empty fields) as having data gaps
expectations.evidence: Identifies new-x1 as 'almost entirely empty' and act2-sc01/act2-sc02 as having no rows at all

expectations.text: Presents findings in a prioritized or structured way
expectations.evidence: 4-item numbered priority list in Recommendation section: gaps → registries → chapter map → scoring

expectations.text: Recommends which domain to tackle first based on the project state
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends 'Fill gaps first' as priority 1, with reasoning about why everything downstream depends on it
